arts.ttl: Club Brugge star says Celtic Champions League rivals must top their Aston Villa win to get anything at Parkhead
arts.sum: But like I said, these are the games that you want to play as a player, and we just have to stay calm, embrace these kind of feelings and just perform on the pitch. And in Milan, but also in the games again against Aston Villa and Dortmund, they were at a very good level.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Juventus: How Champions League football can revive Unai Emery's magic
arts.sum: Aston Villa are without a win in six games across all competitions - but Unai Emery tends to get the best out of his players in European competition.

arts.ttl: Juventus consider loan move for Brighton’s Evan Ferguson
arts.sum: According to reports from Italy, Juventus are considering a move for Brighton’s young striker Evan Ferguson. The 20-year-old Irish international has emerged as a potential loan target for the Bianconeri in the upcoming January transfer window. According to The Telegraph, Brighton are willing to let Ferguson leave on loan this winter. This development has caught the attention of several clubs, including Juventus, who see the young forward as a promising option to bolster their attacking lineup. TuttoJuve report that the interest in Ferguson comes as Juventus assess their striking options, particularly in light of concerns surrounding Arkadiusz Milik’s form and The post Juventus consider loan move for Brighton’s Evan Ferguson appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Every word Pau Torres said ahead of Aston Villa's clash with Juventus
arts.sum: The fact we could beat them in Champions League was a really good moment for me as a player and it was my first time playing in this competition. Pau Torres spoke to the media at Bodymoor Heath on Tuesday afternoon ahead of Aston Villa's Champions League clash against Juventus this evening.
